  "order": [],

  "findings": [
    "Cords routed across active walkways creating trip hazards",
    "Missing guardrails on elevated work surfaces",
    "Blocked egress routes and obstructed fire extinguishers",
    "Improvised, non-compliant scaffolding in use",
    "Unattended and unprotected open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately in affected areas",
    "Reroute or cover cords crossing walkways with heavy-duty cord protectors",
    "Install compliant guardrails or personal fall arrest systems",
    "Clear all blockages from egress paths and fire extinguishers",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and replace with certified, inspected scaffolding",
    "Cover and clearly label or barricade all open floor holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The active production floor contains multiple critical safety violations including fall hazards, trip hazards, blocked emergency equipment, and non-compliant access equipment. These conditions present an immediate danger to life and health (IDLH) and violate basic OSHA standards, requiring an immediate stop-work order and corrective action.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1910.22 (General Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1910.37 (Maintenance, safeguards, and operational features for exit routes)"
  ]
}
